name: Line Smooth POP
description: The Line Smooth POP smooths line strips by blending the positions of adjacent points along a line strip. It blends based on a choice of two methods: In the Smooth by Edge Distance method you give it a distance and it will find the points within that distance along the edge in both directions and blend them using either a Gaussian weighting or a Box weighting. With the Gaussian weighting, points farther from the computed point are given a lower weight. With a Box weighting, all points that are found along the adjacent edges up to the specified distance are give equal weight in computing the resulting point position. In the second Smooth by Point Steps method you give a number of adjacent points in each direction to include in the smoothing calculation. In this method, points that are far from a given points may be included in the smoothing. In the End Points Fixed option, it assures that the original end points of each line strip do not move. In the Pre-Divide stage, it optionally adds more points by subdividing, similar to how the [[Line Divide POP]] adds new points, and it can add points based on the curvature of adjacent points. '''Per-point mapping of parameters''' - The Line Smooth POP has a Map page, which allows every point to get a different value for Edge Distance and Point Step Filter Size parameters. In this mechanism, a separate attribute in the input contains values that override (or add to / multiply by) the parameter value. See [[Mapping POP Attributes to Parameters]]. See also [[Line Divide POP]], [[Line Resample POP]]

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Input Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Input Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Input's attributes you want to affect within the chosen attribute class, or attribute components.

parameters.name: Pre-Divide
parameters.label: Pre-Divide
parameters.description: Enable preceding division

parameters.name: Max Distance
parameters.label: Max Distance
parameters.description: Maximum Distance between Points

parameters.name: Maximum Number of Vertices
parameters.label: Maximum Number of Vertices
parameters.description: Sets the number of vertices to be allocated. It should be bigger than the actual number of vertices created (visible in info popup). More vertices allocated use more GPU memory.

parameters.name: Filter Method
parameters.label: Filter Method
parameters.description: Determines the line smoothing method.

parameters.name: Filter Type
parameters.label: Filter Type
parameters.description: Determines smoothing kernel type.

parameters.name: Edge Distance
parameters.label: Edge Distance
parameters.description: When Smoothing by Edge Distance, this is how far to look in each direction along the adjacent edges to contribute to a smoothed position value.

parameters.name: Point Step Filter Size
parameters.label: Point Step Filter Size
parameters.description: Sets the number of points used by the smoothing kernel.

parameters.name: Effect
parameters.label: Effect
parameters.description: Determines the amount of smoothing applied

parameters.name: End Points Fixed
parameters.label: End Points Fixed
parameters.description: Enable output of fixed endpoints

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the POP input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: Attribute Type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: Components
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: Default Value
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: Default values of the output attribute components if they cannot be computed.

parameters.name: Resample Method
parameters.label: Resample Method
parameters.description: Line strip resample method.

parameters.name: Min Distance
parameters.label: Min Distance
parameters.description: The minimum distance between points in the output line strips.

parameters.name: Max Distance
parameters.label: Max Distance
parameters.description: Maximum Distance between Points

parameters.name: Min Max Bias
parameters.label: Min Max Bias
parameters.description: Bias of point creation - more near the minimum or more near the maximum distance.

parameters.name: Max Tries for Binary Search
parameters.label: Max Tries for Binary Search
parameters.description: Max number of iterations for binary search when linearly resampling.

parameters.name: Mapping
parameters.label: Mapping
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute-to-parameter mapping.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Line_Smooth_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
